_comment: Golden expected end-state of the WEAKEN scenario (ADR-0012). Three scripted events drive one takeaway T: A (session s1) routes `new` -> mints T {support 1/1, contradictions 0/0}; B (session s2, same lesson) routes `strengthen` -> support 2/2, T matures (net 2 >= MATURITY_SESSIONS=2); C (session s3, contradicting) routes `weaken` -> contradictions 1/1, net = 2-1 = 1 < 2, so T LEAVES current_takeaways, APPEARS in contradicted_takeaways, STILL in catalog (never deleted), and its contradiction evidence is span-verified. The test builds the actual end-state from the run and asserts actual == this, key-by-key with a legible diff. The takeaway id is dynamic (minted off A's event id), so it is asserted separately, not pinned here. Regenerate only when the weaken semantics change.
